facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 1,308 reviews. Rory's Beach Bar on Phú Quốc earns every single one.

Cold drinks, sand underfoot, ocean right there. $15-30 a person gets you a full session at one of Phu Quoc's most consistently rated beach bars.

Not luck. Not one good weekend. Over a thousand people said the same thing.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
